home.title: SELECT STUDENT
home.subtitle: Click on a student card to view their profile. Use keyboard arrows or swipe on mobile to navigate.

tutorial.mouse_desc: Click on student cards to view profiles. Scroll to explore content.
tutorial.keyboard_desc: Use Left/Right arrows to switch students. Press Enter to open profile. Press Escape to go home.
tutorial.touch_swipe: Swipe Left/Right to switch between students.
tutorial.touch_tap: Tap on a student card to open their profile.
tutorial.touch_down: Use the back button or swipe down to go back.
tutorial.games_desc: Open Games from the navbar to play Memory, Tic-Tac-Toe, Typing Race, and more!

about.title: About Us
about.description: FULL STACK 5 is an elite web development cohort dedicated to pushing the boundaries of modern digital experiences. Formed with a vision to merge aesthetic brilliance with robust engineering, we specialize in building immersive, high-performance applications. Our technology stack is carefully curated: React for dynamic user interfaces, Vite for lightning-fast builds, Three.js for 3D rendering, and Framer Motion for smooth animations. Our goal is to set a new standard in the industry, proving that functionality and premium design can coexist flawlessly.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Connect with us digitally.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.setup_note: System is ready. Don't forget to set up EmailJS keys.

footer.copyright: All rights reserved. Design & Development: R. Huseynzade & FS5.

overlay.close_hint: Press Escape or click back to close

ramazan.hint: Please enter the decryption command. Hint: HACK_CORE

guide.welcome_desc: This interactive guide will walk you through all the features of this premium portfolio experience.
guide.nav_desc: Use the top menu to navigate between Home, About, Contact, and Games pages. On mobile, tap the burger menu.
guide.students_desc: Click on any student card to view their profile. Drag to reorder. Use arrow keys or swipe on mobile to navigate.
guide.keyboard_desc: Arrow Left/Right: Switch students. Enter: Open profile. Escape: Go home. ?: Show shortcuts.
guide.games_desc: Open Games from the navbar to play Memory, Tic-Tac-Toe, Typing Race, Reaction Test, or draw on the canvas!
guide.themes_desc: Toggle dark/light mode from the header. Use the Theme Creator (floating + button) to build your own color scheme.
guide.extras_desc: Use the chatbot for FAQs. Earn achievement badges by exploring features. Share your favorite profiles! Try the fireworks canvas!

penalty.title: SYSTEM LOCKDOWN
penalty.banned: [!] YOU ARE BANNED FOR 1 HOUR. DO NOT ATTEMPT RE-ENTRY.
